Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Fixed verbal clause with object suffix
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: To become overwhelmed by worry or confusion
Usage Contexts: Daily speech, family discussions, emotional situations
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Common across Iraqi and Iranian Suret communities
First Example Sentence: ܡ̣ܢ ܝܵܘܡܵܐ ܕܫܡܝܼܥ ܚܒܵܪܵܐ ܐܟ݂ܠܹܗ ܪܹܫܹܗ ܒܚܸܫܒܘܼܢܵܐ.
Second Example Sentence: ܠܵܐ ܬܲܚܫܸܒ ܟܠܔ ܡܸܢܕܝܼ، ܠܵܐ ܐܵܟ݂ܠܸܬ ܪܹܫܘܼܟ݂.
Third Example Sentence: ܒܵܒܝܼ ܐܟ݂ܠܹܗ ܪܹܫܹܗ ܡ̣ܢ ܕܹܝܢܹ̈ܐ ܘܫܘܼܓ݂ܠܵܐ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Situations are always changing and unstable
First Example Sentence: ܡܲܝܵܐ ܠܵܐ ܢܵܝܡܝܼ، ܘܐܵܦ ܚܲܝܹ̈ܐ ܠܵܐ ܩܵܝܡܝܼ ܥܲܠ ܚܲܕ ܚܵܠ.
Second Example Sentence: ܣܵܒܵܐ ܕܝܼܝܼ ܒܟܠ ܙܒܲܢ ܐܵܡܹܪ ܕܡܲܝܵܐ ܠܵܐ ܢܵܝܡܝܼ.
Third Example Sentence: ܒܦܘܼܠܝܼܛܝܼܩܵܐ ܡܲܝܵܐ ܠܵܐ ܢܵܝܡܝܼ ܘܚܲܕܬܵܬܹ̈ܐ ܬܲܡܵܢ.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Past-tense verbal idiom with reflexive nuance
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: To take responsibility for one’s actions
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Traditional metaphor of carrying burdens physically
First Example Sentence: ܟܲܕ ܛܥܹܢܹܗ ܥܲܠ ܩܲܕܠܹܗ، ܫܪܹܐ ܠܡܸܥܒܲܕ ܬܘܼܩܵܢܵܐ.
Second Example Sentence: ܡܲܠܦܵܢܵܐ ܒܥܹܐ ܡܸܢܹܗ ܕܛܵܥܹܢ ܥܲܠ ܩܲܕܠܹܗ.
Third Example Sentence: ܒܪܘܿܢܵܐ ܛܥܹܢܹܗ ܥܲܠ ܩܲܕܠܹܗ ܘܐܡܝܼܪܹܗ ܕܗ̇ܘ ܥܒܸܕܠܹܗ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: A person who is emotionally cold or indifferent
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Widely used in village storytelling traditions
First Example Sentence: ܐܵܗܵܐ ܓܲܒܪܵܐ ܥܲܝܢܹܗ ܩܲܪܝܼܪܬܵܐ ܘܠܵܐ ܝܵܕܹܥ ܪ̈ܲܚܡܹܐ.
Second Example Sentence: ܐܵܢܝܼ ܐܡܝܼܪܗܘܿܢ ܕܥܲܝܢܹܗ ܩܲܪܝܼܪܬܵܐ ܡ̣ܢ ܝܵܘܡܵܐ ܕܙܥܘܿܪܵܐ.
Third Example Sentence: ܠܵܐ ܬܸܣܒܲܪ ܡܸܢܹܗ ܥܘܼܕܪܵܢܵܐ، ܥܲܝܢܹܗ ܩܲܪܝܼܪܬܵܐ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Truth eventually becomes visible despite concealment
First Example Sentence: ܐܵܦ ܐܸܢ ܛܸܫܝܵܐ ܙܲܒܢܵܐ ܪܲܒܵܐ، ܕܡܹܐ ܠܵܐ ܟܵܬܹܒ.
Second Example Sentence: ܣܵܒܬܝܼ ܬܵܡܵܐ ܐܵܡܪܵܐ ܕܕܡܹܐ ܠܵܐ ܟܵܬܹܒ.

First Example Sentence: ܒܲܬܪ ܚܲܡܫܵܐ ܫܸܢܹ̈ܐ ܦܬܸܚܠܹܗ ܠܸܒܹܗ ܠܚܲܒܪܹܗ.
Second Example Sentence: ܟܲܕ ܝܬܸܒܘܼܢ ܒܝܬܵܐ ܦܬܸܚܠܹܗ ܠܸܒܹܗ ܩܲܕܡ ܐܸܡܹܗ.
Third Example Sentence: ܐܵܢܵܐ ܒܥܹܝܢ ܕܬܵܦܬܸܚ ܠܸܒܘܼܟ݂ ܘܬܵܐܡܪܸܬ ܫܪܵܪܵܐ.

Second Example Sentence: ܒܚܲܕ ܥܸܕܵܐ ܠܵܐ ܙܒܸܢܹܗ ܐܵܦ ܚܲܕ ܡܸܢܕܝܼ، ܐܝܼܕܹܗ ܩܠܝܼܠܬܵܐ.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Motion verb idiom in past tense
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Someone acting shocked or overly dramatic
First Example Sentence: ܟܲܕ ܫܡܝܼܥܹܗ ܐܵܗܵܐ ܚܒܵܪܵܐ ܢܦܸܠܹܗ ܡ̣ܢ ܫܡܲܝܵܐ.
Second Example Sentence: ܠܵܐ ܬܸܥܒܸܕ ܢܲܦܫܘܼܟ݂ ܕܢܦܸܠܸܬ ܡ̣ܢ ܫܡܲܝܵܐ.
Third Example Sentence: ܐܵܢܝܼ ܓܚܸܟܘܼܢ ܥܲܠܹܗ ܣܵܒܵܒ ܕܢܦܸܠܹܗ ܡ̣ܢ ܫܡܲܝܵܐ.

Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Mountain imagery tied to Assyrian geography
First Example Sentence: ܐܵܦ ܒܩܘܼܫܝܵܬܹ̈ܐ ܩܵܡ ܒܪܹܫ ܛܘܼܪܵܐ ܘܠܵܐ ܢܦܸܠ.
Second Example Sentence: ܡܲܠܟܵܐ ܒܚܘܼܛܒܹܗ ܐܡܝܼܪܹܗ ܕܥܲܡܵܐ ܩܵܡ ܒܪܹܫ ܛܘܼܪܵܐ.
Third Example Sentence: ܐܵܗܵܐ ܬܵܘܕܝܼܬܵܐ ܠܐܢܵܫܹ̈ܐ ܕܩܵܡܝܼ ܒܪܹܫ ܛܘܼܪܵܐ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Someone trying to achieve the impossible
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Inspired by ancient Mesopotamian solar symbolism
First Example Sentence: ܐܵܢܵܐ ܚܫܸܒܠܝܼ ܕܓܢܸܒܠܹܗ ܫܸܡܫܵܐ ܡ̣ܢ ܪܘܼܡܵܐ.
Second Example Sentence: ܟܠ ܝܵܘܡܵܐ ܡܚܲܙܹܐ ܠܲܢ ܕܓܢܸܒܠܹܗ ܫܸܡܫܵܐ.
